name: Vengeful Spirits

abilities.name: Vengeance
abilities.text: Once per activation. After resolving an attack action that damaged this model, this model may drain a (soulstone) to deal 2 irreducible damage to the attacking model.

actions.name: Kirai's Blessing
actions.effects: If a friendly Ikiryo, Spirit of Vengeance is in play, place it into base contact with this model. If a friendly Ikiryo, Spirit of Vengeance is not in play, summon it in base contact with this model. Then, a friendly Ikiryo, Spirit of Vengeance may declare a (melee) action.

extraction_notes: The (soulstone) symbol appears in the Vengeance ability text
The (melee) symbol appears in Kirai's Blessing text as part of 'declare a (melee) action'
Spirit of Vengeance is italicized in the original text
